post.description: Creates a new rental agreement between landlord, tenant, and optionally an agent. Includes Stellar wallet addresses for blockchain-based payments and escrow.

400.description: Invalid input data or validation errors

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of rental agreements with optional filtering by status, parties, or date range.
Retrieve detailed information about a specific rental agreement by its ID, including all parties and payment history.

put.description: Update existing rental agreement details. Only fields provided in the request body will be modified.

400.description: Invalid input data or validation errors

delete.description: Soft-delete a rental agreement by marking it as terminated. Requires termination reason and optionally notes.

400.description: Invalid termination reason or agreement already terminated

post.description: Record a rental payment for a specific agreement. Can be used for both manual payment recording and blockchain payment confirmation.
post.summary: Record a payment for an agreement

get.summary: Query audit logs with filtering and pagination
Get audit trail for a specific entity
Get activity logs for a specific user

delete.summary: Manually cleanup old audit logs (admin only)

post.summary: Manually trigger log retention cleanup (admin only)

post.description: Submit a review for a user (e.g. landlord/tenant) in a given context (LEASE, MAINTENANCE).
Flag a review for moderation (e.g. inappropriate content).
Start a fiat deposit flow via Stellar anchor.
Start a fiat withdrawal via Stellar anchor.
Called by anchor to notify status. Not for client use.

200.description: Returns the total number of payments

get.summary: Get total amount paid for a specific agreement

post.summary: Create a new maintenance request (Tenants only)

post.description: Returns a pre-signed S3 URL for uploading a file. Use the returned key with GET /storage/download-url to get a download URL.

get.description: Returns a pre-signed URL to download a file by its storage key.

403.description: Forbidden - key not owned by user

post.description: Creates a new property listing. Only landlords and admins can create properties.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of property listings with optional filtering. By default, returns only published properties for public access.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search keyword for title and description

get.description: Retrieve all properties owned by the authenticated user.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search keyword for title and description

get.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific property by its ID. Only published properties are publicly accessible.

patch.description: Update an existing property. Only the owner or admin can update a property.

403.description: Forbidden - not the owner or admin

delete.description: Delete a property listing. Only the owner or admin can delete a property.

403.description: Forbidden - not the owner or admin

post.description: Change property status from draft to published. Only the owner or admin can publish.

403.description: Forbidden - not the owner or admin

post.description: Archive a property listing. Only the owner or admin can archive.

403.description: Forbidden - not the owner or admin

post.description: Mark a property as rented. Only the owner or admin can change this status.

403.description: Forbidden - not the owner or admin

400.description: Invalid input or account not deleted

post.description: Create a new user account with secure password hashing

400.description: Invalid input or password does not meet requirements

post.description: Authenticate user with email and password. Returns MFA token if MFA is enabled.
Complete login after MFA verification
Get a new access token using refresh token from cookie or body
Invalidate user refresh token
Send password reset email to registered email address
Reset password using reset token received via email

get.description: Verify user email address using token sent via email

post.description: Generate MFA secret and QR code for TOTP setup
Verify TOTP token or backup code
Disable MFA for the current user
Generate new backup codes for MFA

get.description: Check if MFA is enabled for the current user

post.description: Generate a challenge transaction for the client to sign with their Stellar wallet

400.description: Invalid wallet address or challenge already exists

post.description: Verify the signed challenge and authenticate the user with their Stellar wallet

401.description: Invalid signature, expired challenge, or verification failed

get.description: Retrieve comprehensive authentication metrics including success rates, method breakdown, and trends

parameters.name: days
parameters.description: Number of days to analyze (default: 30, max: 365)

get.description: Retrieve performance metrics including response time percentiles for each authentication method

parameters.name: days
parameters.description: Number of days to analyze (default: 30, max: 365)

parameters.name: days
parameters.description: Number of days to analyze (default: 7, max: 30)

get.description: Quick health check of authentication system with key metrics

post.description: Creates a new on-chain profile for the authenticated user. Requires a connected Stellar wallet.

400.description: Bad request - wallet not connected or invalid input

put.description: Updates the authenticated user's profile. If the data hash changes, the on-chain data will be updated.

400.description: Bad request - wallet not connected or invalid input

get.description: Retrieves the on-chain and off-chain profile data for the authenticated user.
Retrieves the on-chain and off-chain profile data for a given wallet address. This is a public endpoint.

parameters.name: address
parameters.description: Stellar wallet address (56 characters, starts with G)

get.description: Verifies that the off-chain profile data matches the hash stored on-chain.
Returns security contact and policy information per RFC 9116

get.summary: Get security events for a specific user
Check for suspicious activity on a user account

get.summary: Generate SOC2 Type II compliance report
List all RBAC roles with permissions

Anchor latest audit log batch to blockchain

get.summary: Translate a key for a given language

Create a new API key for use with X-API-Key header. The raw key is returned only once.

info.title: Chioma API
info.description: REST API for Chioma — Stellar blockchain-based rental payment platform.

propertyId.description: Property ID for the rental agreement

landlordStellarPubKey.description: Landlord Stellar public key for blockchain payments

tenantStellarPubKey.description: Tenant Stellar public key for blockchain payments

agentStellarPubKey.description: Agent Stellar public key for commission payments

escrowAccountPubKey.description: Escrow account public key for security deposits

termsAndConditions.description: Additional terms and conditions for the lease
termsAndConditions.example: No smoking policy. Pets allowed with additional deposit.

terminationReason.example: Mutual agreement to end lease early

terminationNotes.example: Tenant found new job in different city

revieweeId.description: ID of the user being reviewed

propertyId.description: Property ID when context is LEASE

agentAddress.description: Agent Stellar public key to verify

isPrimary.description: Whether this is the primary image

description.example: Beautiful modern apartment with stunning city views, fully renovated kitchen, and access to building amenities.

rentalUnits.description: Array of rental units (for multi-unit properties)

description.example: Beautiful modern apartment with stunning city views, fully renovated kitchen, and access to building amenities.

rentalUnits.description: Array of rental units (for multi-unit properties)

email.description: Email of the account to restore

password.description: Password of the account to restore
Password (minimum 8 characters, must include uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character)

mfaToken.description: Temporary MFA token received from login endpoint

mfaCode.description: TOTP token from authenticator app or backup code

deviceName.description: Optional device name for the MFA device

token.description: TOTP token from authenticator app or backup code
TOTP token or backup code to confirm MFA disable

challenge.description: Challenge transaction XDR for client to sign

accountType.description: The type of account (tenant, landlord, or agent)

dataHash.description: SHA-256 hash of the off-chain data stored on-chain

ipfsCid.description: IPFS Content Identifier (CID) where profile data is stored

ipfsUrl.description: IPFS gateway URL to access the profile data

accountType.description: The type of account (tenant, landlord, or agent)

transactionHash.description: Transaction hash from the blockchain (only if on-chain update was needed)

dataHash.description: Current SHA-256 hash of the off-chain data

ipfsCid.description: IPFS Content Identifier (CID) where profile data is stored

ipfsUrl.description: IPFS gateway URL to access the profile data

dataHash.description: SHA-256 hash of off-chain data (64 hex characters)

isVerified.description: Whether the profile has been verified by an admin

dataHash.description: Computed SHA-256 hash of off-chain data

ipfsCid.description: IPFS Content Identifier (CID) where profile data is stored

ipfsUrl.description: IPFS gateway URL to access the profile data

lastSyncedAt.description: Last time profile was synced with on-chain data

walletAddress.description: Wallet address of the profile owner

onChain.description: On-chain profile data (null if not found on chain)

dataIntegrityValid.description: Whether the off-chain data hash matches the on-chain hash

valid.description: Whether the data integrity check passed

onChainHash.description: Hash stored on-chain (null if profile not found on-chain)

message.description: Human-readable message about the verification result
message.example: Data integrity verified: off-chain data matches on-chain hash
Would be great to have webhooks for agreement events.
